what_was_done: Session 543: Phase 3 complete (27/27 tasks, 3 waves). 8 new shared modules: polarquant, knowledge_graph, tool_profiles, self_improve, insights, shadow_git, dream_agent, vector_index. memory_server.py wired with L3 vector search + KG + embedding dedup. 371 tests (was 246), 0 failures. All Phase 4 interface requirements satisfied.
known_issues: rate_limits statusline field null on API key billing
Gate 23: Go test naming too rigid — needs smarter _has_test_on_disk for Go packages
next_steps: Phase 4: Integration testing + end-to-end validation of new modules
Address known issues (Gate 2 rm -r gap, Gate 23 Go naming)
last_response_preview: Session 543 completed all Phase 3 waves. 27/27 tasks done via parallel builder agents. 8 new modules, 125 new tests (246→371), 0 failures. Dream agent, vector search, KG wiring, embedding dedup all integrated into memory_server.py.
